privileged_info_summary: The task csv_import@1 is an easy task with 120-second timeout and max 10 steps. It uses synthetic employee data created programmatically in setup_task.sh. The actual CSV file contains the header 'Employee ID,Name,Department,Salary,Hire Date' with four data rows: (1001, Alice Smith, Engineering, 85000, 2020-01-15), (1002, Bob Johnson, Marketing, 72000, 2019-03-20), (1003, Carol Davis, Engineering, 92000, 2018-07-10), (1004, David Wilson, Sales, 68000, 2021-05-05). The verifier checks 4 criteria: correct name in B2 (Alice Smith), correct salary in D2 (85000), correct year in E2 (2020), and minimum 5 rows total. Passing requires 75% score (3 of 4 criteria). IMPORTANT: The README.md documentation contains significant inaccuracies - it claims different column header (ID vs Employee ID), different employee names (Bob Jones vs Bob Johnson, Charlie Brown vs Carol Davis, Diana Prince vs David Wilson), different salaries, and different hire dates. The actual data used comes from setup_task.sh, not the README specification.
